meaning: n.古文物研究者,收集古文物者adj.古文物研究的
examples: He enjoyed a great reputation as an antiquarian.
Added in Localization for all new strings added in the Antiquarian Patch.
Antiquarian map societies are prospering, and celestial maps are now viewed as a specialty of map collecting.
He knows that accounts of revelry or expenditure on gourmet food and drink are ultimately antiquarian.
Three-quarters of Ms Lorenz's work is at antiquarian book auctions, mostly in Germany, Switzerland and Austria.
